{{Quote|I'm not a Jedi. I want to be a Sith. I've only begun to discover my power.|The Dark Jedi to Darth Vader|<ref name="Empire 4">[[Empire 4|''Empire'' 4]]</ref>}}
The '''Dargulli Dark Jedi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who lived during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I apologize for the ruse which led you here. I killed those drones... I knew you'd come to investigate ''this''.|The Dark Jedi displaying her lightsaber to Darth Vader|<ref name="Empire 4" />}}
Several weeks before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she was on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]], where she [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] sent to collect taxes, hoping to attract the attention of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. She had foreseen that Vader [[Battle of Endor/Legends|would kill]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and sensed that he could bring order to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and rule [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. She also could sense that Vader was missing something in his life. To this end, she wished to become his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]. Vader, although tempted, killed her after only a moment's hesitation.

Though her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] appeared to resemble that of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and thus lacked a traditional [[Synthetic lightsaber crystal/Legends|dark side crystal]], she claimed not to be one, and Vader sensed no Jedi teachings in her, leaving her origins a mystery.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Sidirri]] was intended to be a younger version of this character.<ref name="wannabe">{{Facebook|username=people/Randy-Stradley-Dark-Horse/100031934906768|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=856179077780153&id=120655541332514&fref=nf|name=Randy Stradley Dark Horse|date=January 2, 2015|archivedate=20200819184945}}</ref>
